alert.title: ⚑ DEAL FOUND

minimap.caption: Hover a listing to preview its position
chart.modal.title: Price Trend — Expanded
label.name: Name
placeholder.chart_unavailable: DB query unavailable — start the poller first
placeholder.no_history: No history data for the current filters
placeholder.calc_hint: How many +1 items do you have?
placeholder.calc_empty: Enter how many +1 items you have
features.desc: Disable features you don't use. The tab will be hidden from the bar.
window.position_hint: Position is saved automatically when you move the window.
hotkeys.hint: Click a field then press any key or combination.
support.hint: Here you can buy me a coffee :)
msg.enter_item_or_category: Enter an item name or category to watch
msg.no_history_filters: No history data for these filters
msg.no_history: No history data for the current filters
tip.search_input: Type item name or keyword to search the market
tip.search_btn: Fetch current market listings matching your filters
tip.filter_minor_search: Filter by item sub-type within the selected category
tip.any_plus_search: Match any enchanted item (+1 or above)
tip.filter_sockets_search: Filter by number of sockets on the item
tip.max_price_limit: Only show listings at or below this price (in gold)
tip.clear_listings_search: Clear current results without resetting filters
tip.calc_count: Enter the total count of +1 items to see what higher-plus items you can craft
tip.load_history: Load price history records matching the current filters
tip.days_1: Show data from the past 1 day
tip.days_3: Show data from the past 3 days
tip.days_7: Show data from the past 7 days
tip.days_14: Show data from the past 14 days
tip.days_30: Show data from the past 30 days
tip.watch_input: Item name to watch for on the market
tip.watch_quality: Only alert for matches at this quality or above
tip.watch_plus: Only alert for items with this enchantment level
tip.watch_any_plus: Alert for any enchanted item (+1 or above)
tip.watch_sockets: Only alert for items with this socket count
tip.watch_interval: How often the market is checked for matching listings
tip.watch_price_basis: Set max price as a fixed value or a percentage below a historical reference
tip.watch_pct: How many percent below the chosen baseline the max price should be set
tip.use_history: Calculate max price from your saved price history using the chosen basis and percentage
tip.watch_price: Only alert when a matching item is listed at or below this price
tip.clear_listings_watch: Clear current match results without stopping the watch
tip.clear_watch: Clear all watch filters and stop watching
tip.watch_start: Start or stop monitoring the market for matching listings
tip.profile_select: Select which automation profile to configure and run
tip.new_profile: Create a new empty automation profile
tip.delete_profile: Permanently delete the currently selected profile
tip.export_profile: Save the selected profile to a file for backup or sharing
tip.import_profile: Load a previously exported profile from a file
tip.refresh_state: Reload the current automation state from the background service
tip.restart_helper: Restart the native automation helper process
tip.toggle_master: Enable or disable all automation clicks at once
tip.emergency_stop: Immediately stop all clicks and release all held keys
tip.toggle_left: Enable or disable the left mouse button auto-click
tip.toggle_right: Enable or disable the right mouse button auto-click
tip.toggle_fkey: Enable or disable the configured F-key auto-press
tip.toggle_shift: Enable or disable holding Shift during clicks
tip.toggle_ctrl: Enable or disable holding Ctrl during clicks
tip.left_ms: Delay in milliseconds between left mouse button clicks
tip.right_ms: Delay in milliseconds between right mouse button clicks
tip.fkey_ms: Delay in milliseconds between F-key presses
tip.jitter: Adds random variance to all intervals to make clicking less predictable
tip.theme: Change the colour scheme of the overlay
tip.ui_scale: Scale the entire overlay UI up or down
tip.font_pairing: Change the headline and body font combination
tip.opacity_slider: Adjust overall background transparency of the overlay
tip.text_opacity_slider: Adjust the transparency of text and icons inside the overlay
tip.reset_position: Move the overlay back to the top-left corner of the screen
tip.hotkey_interact: Hotkey to switch between click-through and interactive mode
tip.hotkey_collapse_bind: Hotkey to collapse or expand the overlay
tip.hotkey_hide_bind: Hotkey to completely hide or show the overlay
tip.hotkey_quit_bind: Hotkey to close the application entirely
tip.save_app_hotkeys: Save all four app hotkey bindings
tip.remember_server: Automatically restore your last-selected server when the app starts
tip.profile_name: A short label to identify this automation profile
tip.profile_description: Optional notes about what this profile does
tip.target_title: Title of the game window the automation should attach to
tip.match_mode: How the helper finds the target window
tip.process_name: Executable name of the target process (e.g. Conquer.exe)
tip.require_foreground: Only run automation while the game window is in the foreground
tip.poll_ms: How often (in ms) the helper checks whether the target window is still active
tip.hud: Show the live status HUD overlay on screen
tip.overlay_timers: Show the buff timer overlay on screen
tip.compact_hud: Use a narrower, smaller version of the HUD
tip.active_timers_only: Hide timers that are not currently counting down
tip.hide_hud_unfocused: Automatically hide the HUD when the game window loses focus
tip.hide_timers_unfocused: Automatically hide the timer overlay when the game window loses focus
tip.anchor_mode: Whether overlay positions are relative to the game window or the screen
tip.hotkey_master: Hotkey to toggle the master automation switch on or off
tip.hotkey_emergency: Hotkey to instantly stop all automation
tip.hotkey_left: Hotkey to toggle the left-click automation
tip.hotkey_right: Hotkey to toggle the right-click automation
tip.hotkey_fkey: Hotkey to toggle the F-key press automation
tip.hotkey_shift: Hotkey to toggle holding Shift during automation
tip.hotkey_ctrl: Hotkey to toggle holding Ctrl during automation
tip.hotkey_timer1: Hotkey to manually trigger or reset Timer 1
tip.hotkey_timer2: Hotkey to manually trigger or reset Timer 2
tip.hotkey_timer3: Hotkey to manually trigger or reset Timer 3
tip.support_btn: Open PayPal donation page in browser
